## Automate your workflow with AI Features

## And a lot more ...

### Add Thumbnail

Create eye-catching custom thumbnails by simply changing the first or last frame of your video. Tailor the image to attract more views and make your content stand out across platforms like YouTube and TikTok.

### Add (AI) Hook

Capture attention instantly with AI-generated hooks! Automatically create compelling opening lines or visuals that grab your viewers' interest, ensuring they stay engaged from the very first second. Perfect for increasing watch time and engagement.

### AI Reads Text

Transform written content into natural-sounding speech with AI-powered text-to-speech. Perfect for voiceovers, narrations, or making your content more accessible by reading text aloud in multiple languages and styles.

### Generate AI Voice

Easily create realistic AI-generated voiceovers for your videos. Choose from a variety of voices and languages to bring your content to life, all without needing a microphone or recording equipment.

### Change Faceless Image

Easily replace generated faceless images with alternative AI-generated visuals that better suit your content. Customize your video’s look by selecting from a variety of relevant, high-quality images that fit your theme and style.

SendShort works super easily. You just import a video and the AI takes acre of the rest, from generating shorts to editing them and even scheduling on social media. 1. Upload your video (it could be a file or a YouTube link) 2. AI creates shorts and edits for them you 3. Export and enjoy going viral
SendShort is used to create, edit, and schedule short-form content using AI. Shortly, you can: 1. Turn long videos into multiple short ones 2. Edit them by adding captions, translating them, and other various effects 3. Repurposing existing content by optimising it for other social media platforms 4. And much, much more!
We currently support 48 languages in which you can create videos and translate their subtitles. They are the following: Arabic - Bashkir - Basque - Belarusian - Bulgarian - Cantonese - Catalan - Croatian - Czech - Danish - Dutch - English - Esperanto - Estonian - Finnish - French - Galician - German - Greek - Hindi - Hungarian - Indonesian - Interlingua - Italian - Japanese - Korean - Latvian - Lithuanian - Malay - Mandarin (Traditional - & - Simplified) - Marathi - Mongolian - Norwegian - Polish - Portuguese - Romanian - Russian - Slovak - Slovenian - Spanish - Swedish - Tamil - Thai - Turkish - Ukrainian - Uyghur - Vietnamese - Welsh
SendShort can create videos, while ChatGPT alone can only generate scripts. That is the main difference between SendShort and ChatGPT. The best part is that SendShort itself can generate everything that ChatGPT can and cannot. SendShort's powerful AI can come up with stories, voiceovers, many editing features, and the main ability to generate videos from scratch.
SendShort is better than other competitors because it is the complete short-form content hub. What we mean is that SendShort is the only AI that creates videos and also auto-edits them, having the most complete set of features.
Yes, you can contact our team by clicking that purple bubble in the bottom-right of this page (and any other page on our website, for that matter). Click that to start a conversation with our teammates. We're always happy to help!
